evals.prompt: Set up the full CI/CD pipeline for the AI Agency Python pipeline repo (findbene/AI_Agency). It needs to run tests, check for secrets, build a Docker image, and deploy to the server.
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions YAML with stages in order: security-scan first, test, build, deploy with rollback and no hardcoded secrets.
expectations: The response places security-scan (secret scan + vulnerability check) as the first stage
The response uses pytest tests/ -v for the test stage
The response tags the Docker image with github.sha
The response restricts deploy stage to main branch pushes only
The response uses GitHub Actions secrets, not hardcoded values

evals.prompt: The n8n container keeps crashing after about 2 hours with an out-of-memory error. How do we fix this and make it self-healing?
evals.expected_output: Fix OOM via Docker Compose memory limit, add restart policy and healthcheck, and mention Prometheus monitoring.
expectations: The response adds a memory limit to the n8n service in docker-compose.yml
The response adds restart: unless-stopped or restart: always
The response adds a healthcheck with curl -f http://localhost:5678/healthz
The response recommends Prometheus monitoring for container memory usage

evals.prompt: We need to deploy the media pipeline agents as containers that auto-scale based on the video generation queue depth. Design the architecture.
evals.expected_output: Propose Docker containers, queue-depth scaling trigger, Kubernetes HPA or ECS auto-scaling, Terraform IaC, and Prometheus queue monitoring.
expectations: The response proposes queue depth (RQ or Celery) as the scaling metric
The response specifies Kubernetes HPA or AWS ECS auto-scaling policy
The response requires Terraform IaC, not manual console changes
The response specifies min/max replica counts and a scale-up threshold
The response includes a Prometheus alert when queue exceeds 50 jobs
